result: Built agent skill configuration system with toggles, permissions, rate limits, and usage analytics. Created AgentSkillConfigService with tool-to-skill mapping (10 skills, 30+ tools), skill enable/disable checks, read/read-write permission enforcement, and per-skill hourly rate limiting. Wired skill checks into AgentOrchestrator.executeTool() alongside existing permission checks - disabled skills block tool execution with clear error messages. Added recordSkillUsage() tracking after every tool execution (success and failure). Enhanced SkillsTab UI with rate limit input fields, inline mini-analytics, and a dedicated Analytics sub-tab showing per-skill execution counts, success rates, average duration, and top tools. Added getSkillAnalytics and checkSkillPermission tRPC endpoints. Build passes successfully.
